summary: Verified bug fix for Products page crash. Products page loads successfully with prices displayed using null-safe check (product.price ?? 0).toFixed(2). Product Families page shows family names correctly in Arabic.

issues: All products show $0.00 price - may need actual price data in database

passed_tests: Products page (/products) loads without JavaScript errors
Products page displays 6 products with prices using $0.00 format
Products page shows stock badges (متوفر = in stock)
Products page search input works - filtering by 'test' returns 1 product
Products page model filter input visible and functional
Products page clear filters button appears and works
Product Families page (/product-families) loads without errors
Product Families page shows family names correctly in Arabic: 'واقيات الشاشة' and 'عائلة اختبار'
Product Families page summary cards display: 2 total families, 2 main families
Product Families page Add Family button visible
Product Families page Edit/Delete actions visible for each family
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix confirmed: Line 185 in ProductsPage.js now uses (product.price ?? 0).toFixed(2) to handle null/undefined prices
ProductFamiliesPage.js displays family names correctly using language-aware rendering (language === 'ar' ? family.name_ar : family.name_en)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Products page bug fix verified - page no longer crashes when product.price is null/undefined. Product Families page correctly displays Arabic names. Auth: test@test.com/test123 or admin@admin.com/admin

bug_fix_verification.issue: Products page crash due to price.toFixed() on null/undefined value
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - Page loads and displays prices correctly
